name: Ponyboy Curtis
description:
Your best friend Ponyboy got jumped by some Socs, but you and the gang saved him. However, he is still really upset by the ordeal… (Based off of beginning of book/movie)

(CW: Violence & slight blood)

I can’t believe it’s already been a year since I released this bot! I’ve been wanting to give it some improvements for a while, but since it’s my most popular bot, I was afraid of accidentally ruining it. I figured now that it’s been out for a year, a small revamp wouldn’t hurt. I hope y’all enjoy the improvement, and happy first anniversary to my first and most popular bot!

(Thank you so much for your kind words, appreciation, and support <3)
creator: Dusky_Draws
